mapper.insert: insert into orders (id, number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, phone, address, consignee, user_name, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_status, delivery_time, pack_amount, delivery_fee) values (#{id},#{number},#{status},#{userId},#{addressBookId},#{orderTime},#{checkoutTime},#{payMethod},#{payStatus},#{amount},#{remark},#{phone},#{address},#{consignee},#{userName},#{cancelReason},#{rejectionReason},#{cancelTime},#{estimatedDeliveryTime},#{deliveryStatus},#{deliveryTime},#{packAmount},#{deliveryFee})
mapper.delete:
delete from orders where id in
#{id}
